summary: Iteration 156: Stripe Redirect Fix Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All requested features verified: (1) Appointment creation without card returns checkout_url pointing to /appointments/{id}, (2) Retry guarantee returns checkout_url pointing to /appointments/{id}, (3) Invitation flow preserves /invitation/{token} URL, (4) Card deletion works correctly, (5) Frontend AppointmentDetail.js handles guarantee_status=success and cancelled. Frontend: Login, dashboard, payment settings, and appointment detail pages all working correctly.

passed_tests.test_01_delete_card_before_test: PASS - DELETE /api/user-settings/me/payment-method removes card, GET returns has_payment_method: false
passed_tests.test_02_create_appointment_without_card_: PASS - POST /api/appointments/ with penalty_amount > 0 and no card returns status=pending_organizer_guarantee with organizer_checkout_url pointing to /appointments/{id}?guarantee_status=success (NOT /invitation/)
passed_tests.test_03_retry_guarantee_returns_appointm: PASS - POST /api/appointments/{id}/retry-organizer-guarantee returns checkout_url pointing to /appointments/{id}
passed_tests.test_04_verify_invitation_flow_preserves: PASS - invitations.py has 0 return_url parameters - invitation flow preserved with /invitation/{token}
passed_tests.test_05_verify_appointments_passes_retur: PASS - appointments.py has 2 return_url parameters at lines 682 and 930
passed_tests.test_06_verify_stripe_guarantee_service_: PASS - stripe_guarantee_service.py correctly handles return_url parameter (lines 157, 195-196, 215-219)
passed_tests.test_07_frontend_handles_guarantee_statu: PASS - AppointmentDetail.js detects guarantee_status=success, cleans URL, waits 2s, calls checkActivation(), shows toast
passed_tests.test_08_frontend_handles_guarantee_statu: PASS - AppointmentDetail.js shows warning toast for cancelled guarantee
passed_tests.test_verify_no_payment_method_after_dele: PASS - After DELETE, has_payment_method is false

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Login form works correctly with email/password
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with 50 engagements, 4 actions required, calendar connections visible
frontend_tests.payment_settings_no_card: PASS - Page shows 'Aucune carte enregistrée' with 'Enregistrer une carte' button and warning
frontend_tests.appointment_detail: PASS - Appointment detail page loads correctly with all sections (header, essentials, participants, proof)

critical_code_review_comments: stripe_guarantee_service.py: Line 157 - return_url parameter added with default None
stripe_guarantee_service.py: Lines 195-196 - Dev mode uses return_url for success_url when provided
stripe_guarantee_service.py: Lines 215-222 - Production mode builds success_url with return_url when provided, else uses /invitation/{token}
invitations.py: Lines 384, 698, 826, 955 - All 4 calls to create_guarantee_session do NOT pass return_url, preserving /invitation/{token} flow
AppointmentDetail.js: Lines 379-408 - useEffect detects guarantee_status=success, cleans URL, waits 2s for webhook, calls checkActivation(), shows toast
AppointmentDetail.js: Lines 403-406 - Handles guarantee_status=cancelled with warning toast
user_settings.py: Lines 317-346 - DELETE /me/payment-method clears both user-level and participant-level card data
seed_data_creation: TEST_REDIRECT_FIX_* appointment created and cancelled during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe redirect fix verified. Key change: create_guarantee_session() now accepts optional return_url parameter. When called from appointments.py (2 call sites at lines 682 and 930), return_url='/appointments/{appointment_id}' is passed. When called from invitations.py (4 call sites), no return_url is passed → defaults to /invitation/{token}. Frontend AppointmentDetail.js has useEffect that detects guarantee_status=success from URL, cleans URL, waits 2s for webhook, calls checkActivation(), shows toast. Also handles guarantee_status=cancelled with warning toast.

mocked_apis.stripe: Real Stripe test mode (sk_test_*) - NOT mocked

stripe_redirect_fix_verification.frontend_handling: AppointmentDetail.js detects guarantee_status, cleans URL, triggers checkActivation()
